# Divax Shah

This is the AI-readable context file for Divax Shah's portfolio.

Canonical context URL: https://www.divaxshah.com/llms.txt
Full markdown context URL: https://www.divaxshah.com/me.md
Website: https://www.divaxshah.com

Divax Shah is an AI/ML Engineer and founder building commercial AI products, fine-tuning specialized LLMs/VLMs, and creating production-grade AI systems.

Contact:
- Email: divax12345@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/shahdivax
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/divax-shah/
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/divax_shah_
- Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/diabolic6045

Current focus:
- Commercial AI SaaS products.
- LLM and VLM fine-tuning.
- Sanskrit and Indic-language AI.
- OCR, ASR, tokenization, and practical AI workflows.
- Multimodal creator tools for image, video, and audio generation.

Experience:
- Solo Founder, Rented Souls: built AI products under the Rented Souls brand.
- Co-Founder and Architect, Your Humanizer: built an AI text humanization SaaS.
- AI/ML Engineer, Avinyaa Edtech: works on writing tools, grammar checkers, classification, and LLM fine-tuning.
- Jr. Python Developer, Thinkbiz Technology: built LangChain chatbot PoCs and Jugaad, an OCR/LLM invoice parsing pipeline.
- AI and Synthetic Data Developer Intern, DMI Finance: built synthetic-data pipelines with Python, Gradio, and PyTorch.

Projects:

Rented Souls [Avatars]
- URL: https://soul.rentedsouls.com
- Enterprise AI digital persona platform for AI avatars, voice cloning, and talking videos.
- Tags: SaaS, AI avatars, TTS, video generation, founder.

Rented Souls [Everything]
- URL: https://rentedsouls.com
- One-prompt creative production suite for images, video, and audio.
- Includes one credit wallet, multimodal model routing, prompt-to-image-to-video-to-music pipeline mode, and regional-language creative support.
- Regional language focus includes Hindi, Gujarati, Tamil, Bengali, Marathi, and Hinglish.
- Tags: SaaS, image generation, video generation, audio generation, multimodal AI, credits.

Your Humanizer
- URL: https://yourhumanizer.com
- AI text humanization product for transforming LLM-generated writing into more natural human-style prose.
- Tags: SaaS, LLM routing, NLP, text transformation, co-founder.

Sanskrit Qwen2.5-7B Translate V2
- URL: https://huggingface.co/diabolic6045/Sanskrit-qwen-7B-Translate-v2
- Fine-tuned Qwen2.5-7B model for bidirectional Sanskrit and English translation plus Devanagari to IAST transliteration.
- Tags: LLM, LoRA, Sanskrit, translation, flash attention.

Sanskrit Qwen2.5-VL OCR
- URL: https://huggingface.co/diabolic6045/Sanskrit-Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct-OCR
- Vision-language model adapted for Sanskrit OCR from images.
- Tags: VLM, OCR, Sanskrit, Qwen2.5-VL.

GitaWhisper
- URL: https://huggingface.co/diabolic6045/GitaWhisper-tiny
- Fine-tuned Whisper-tiny ASR model for Sanskrit shloka transcription and transliteration.
- Tags: ASR, Whisper, Sanskrit, PyTorch.

Sanskrit Native Tokenizer
- URL: https://huggingface.co/diabolic6045/Sanskrit-English-qwen2-tokenizer
- Native Sanskrit tokenizer with improved tokenization efficiency over byte-level tokenization.
- Tags: NLP, tokenizer, Sanskrit.

Ion-LLM-Base
- URL: https://huggingface.co/diabolic6045/Ion-LLM-Base
- Custom 100M parameter GPT-style Transformer built from scratch on Fineweb using DeepSpeed ZeRO-2 and FP16 precision.
- Tags: GPT, pre-training, DeepSpeed, Transformers.

Open-LLaMA-3.2-1B-Instruct
- URL: https://huggingface.co/diabolic6045/open-llama-3.2-1B-Instruct
- Instruct-tuned LLaMA 3.2 1B model trained on OpenHermes using Axolotl and DeepSpeed.
- Tags: LLaMA, instruct tuning, Axolotl, DeepSpeed.
